understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to reach the goal gem tile (+) by navigating the grid, using horizontal moves and clicks to clear paths, while avoiding spikes and managing turn limits and rising platforms.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement consisted of horizontal moves (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT) followed by automatic gravity fall to a landing tile. CLICK allowed removal of breakable blocks (x) at specified coordinates, which could open new fall paths. Spikes (u/v) caused instant failure if landed on. UNDO reversed the previous action. The game provided landing previews (left_landing/right_landing) and corridor scans showing passages to different y-levels. Each level had 2 attempts of 50 turns each, and rising platforms added a time pressure that only horizontal moves advanced.
